findings.title: Iran threatens Red Sea expansion via Houthis
findings.summary: Iran is pressing Houthis to launch attacks on Red Sea shipping if US escalates, amid Strait of Hormuz closure. This signals I2 military posture escalation through proxy horizontal expansion. UAE intercepted over 2100 Iranian drones/missiles.
findings.claim_excerpt: Iran is now threatening to expand the conflict yet further to the Red Sea and the Bab al-Mandeb.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Risk of multi-chokepoint maritime disruption heightens global energy crisis and draws in more regional actors.
findings.confidence_basis: Multiple institutional analyses confirm pattern of horizontal escalation.

sources_cited.excerpt: Pursuing horizontal escalation, Tehran targeted 14 countries... threatening Red Sea.
Iran is pressing the Houthis to prepare for renewed attacks on Red Sea shipping.

search_queries_run: Iran Houthi Red Sea escalation April 2026
research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Tier 1 sources align on proxy threats tied to US actions; no contradiction.

cross_monitor_relevance.erm: Red Sea attacks compound displacement via trade disruption.
cross_monitor_relevance.gmm: Threatens 10% global seaborne trade including oil.

findings.review_reason: Potential shift to sustained proxy maritime campaign.

findings.title: US-Iran high-level talks in Islamabad amid threats
findings.summary: US and Iran hold highest-level talks in decades in Islamabad, following Trump ultimatum extension. I5 diplomatic engagement occurs parallel to military signaling like US destroyer transits. Experts question if diplomacy or escalation pause.
findings.claim_excerpt: Washington and Tehran meet in Islamabad for talks at the highest level in decades.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Talks may stabilize but fragile amid ongoing strikes and ultimatums.
findings.confidence_basis: Single primary source on talks; corroborated by context in others.

sources_cited.excerpt: US-Iran talks in Islamabad at highest level in decades.
President Trump’s April 6 extension of his deadline on Iran and murky diplomacy.

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Video report aligns with CSIS diplomacy mention; needs Tier 1 confirmation.

findings.episodic_reason: First high-level talks in decades, not sustained channel.

cross_monitor_relevance.fcw: US destroyer transit signals FIMI readiness.

findings.review_reason: Test if talks lead to ceasefire or breakdown.

findings.title: Houthis warn of Red Sea intervention in Iran war
findings.summary: Iran-backed Houthis threaten military intervention if regional states ally with US/Israel or Red Sea used for ops against Iran. Affects I1 rhetoric intensity amid Bab al-Mandeb tensions. Ties to Iran escalation cycle.
findings.claim_excerpt: Houthis will intervene if regional countries ally with US/Israel or Red Sea used hostilely.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Proxy rhetoric amplifies Iran's horizontal strategy, risking wider maritime war.
findings.confidence_basis: Tier 1 institutional tracker with direct quote.

sources_cited.excerpt: Houthis issued warning... amid heightened tensions in Bab al-Mandeb.
Iran threatening Red Sea expansion via Houthis.

search_queries_run: Houthi Red Sea warning Iran war 2026
research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: CFR and CSIS consistent on proxy threats.

findings.title: Sudan fighting shifts to Kordofan, solidifying east-west divide
findings.summary: Fighting moves to Kordofan region as Sudan's conflict divide hardens between east and west. Impacts I6 displacement velocity amid ongoing collapse of systems. Highest civilian toll conflict recently.
findings.claim_excerpt: Fighting moves to Kordofan as Sudan's east–west divide solidifies.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Geographic diffusion increases humanitarian access barriers.
findings.confidence_basis: ACLED watchlist with Statista toll context.

sources_cited.excerpt: Fighting moves to Kordofan as Sudan's east–west divide solidifies.
Sudan civil war... highest civilian death toll of any conflict in recent years.

findings.title: Gaza displacement exceeds 2 million amid fragile ceasefire
findings.summary: Over 2 million Gazans displaced since Oct 2023, trapped with no escape under fragile 2026 ceasefire. I6 velocity remains high due to aid dependency. Over 70,000 killed.
findings.claim_excerpt: Over 2 million people displaced... completely dependent on humanitarian aid.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Ceasefire holds but crisis velocity unchanged; risks snapback.
findings.confidence_basis: UN-affiliated data with Statista ceasefire note.

sources_cited.excerpt: Over 70,000 killed and over 2 million displaced in Gaza.

findings.title: Eastern DRC Hutu militias sustain Rwanda tensions
findings.summary: FDLR and other Hutu militias active in eastern DRC, fueling Rwanda's efforts to curb influence since 2003. I2 posture stable but roots in genocide aftermath drive persistence. Under-covered diffusion.
findings.claim_excerpt: Hutu militias active in eastern DRC; Rwanda trying to limit since 2003.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Chronic low-intensity conflict risks Rwandan cross-border escalation.
findings.confidence_basis: Single detailed source; aligns with historical context.

sources_cited.excerpt: FDLR active in eastern DRC today, Rwanda limiting power.

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Needs ACLED data for recent events; historical reliable.
